project_type: Remotion video generation app (React/TypeScript) for JAWS-UG events
build_system: npm with Remotion CLI; scripts: dev (remotion studio), build (remotion render JawsUgLT), render (remotion render)
test_framework: No test framework configured. No test files exist.
test_command: No tests exist. Verify with TypeScript type checking: npx tsc --noEmit
verification_instructions: 1. Run npm install to install dependencies. 2. Run npx tsc --noEmit to verify TypeScript compiles without errors. 3. Check that sample-props.json uses the new effect names and is valid JSON.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network mode. Node.js v22 available via nvm. No Dockerfile in project.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md found. Follow existing code patterns.
key_patterns: Effect system pattern: (1) Union type in src/types.ts defines valid effect names per scene. (2) Each scene component (IntroScene, TitleScene, SpeakerScene, HashtagScene, LicenseScene) has a render function per effect (e.g. renderSpringBounce). (3) The component's return uses conditional rendering: {effect === 'name' && renderName()}. (4) Animations use Remotion's spring(), interpolate(), useCurrentFrame(), useVideoConfig(). (5) Reusable animation wrappers (FadeIn, SlideUp, ScaleIn) live in src/components/common/animations.tsx. (6) SpeakerScene is more complex: SpeakerCard component handles per-card animation logic with effect-specific branches.
directory_structure: src/ - main source code; src/components/ - scene components (IntroScene, TitleScene, SpeakerScene, HashtagScene, LicenseScene); src/components/common/ - reusable animation wrappers; src/compositions/ - JawsUgLT main composition; src/utils/ - timing and theme utilities; src/types.ts - TypeScript type definitions; sample-props.json - sample config at project root
